---
title: Test R Post
author: R Build
date: '2026-02-01'
slug: test-r-post
categories: []
tags: []
subtitle: ''
summary: ''
authors: []
lastmod: '2026-02-01T21:40:39+01:00'
featured: false
draft: true
image:
  caption: ''
  focal_point: ''
  preview_only: false
projects: []
---


```{r}

x <- 1:10
mean(x)


plot(x, x^2, 
     main = "X vs X squared",
     xlab = "X", 
     ylab = "X²",
     col = "blue",
     pch = 19)
```

The mean is `r mean(x)` and the plot is generated automatically!
